Home Blog

How we cut deploy time by 80%

Our deploys took forty minutes and blocked every other team. I owned the project to get that number down without a freeze.

The rebuild

I rebuilt the pipeline around a content-addressed cache and split the test suite into parallel shards. Each shard published its own status so a single flaky test no longer failed the whole run.

  • Cache hit rate climbed to 92%.
  • Deploys dropped to eight minutes.

The team ships on every merge now instead of batching releases.
